verses.2: Attend to me, and answer me.
verses.3: because of the voice of the enemy,
verses.4: My heart is severely pained within me.
verses.5: Fearfulness and trembling have come on me.
verses.6: I said, “Oh that I had wings like a dove!
verses.7: Behold, then I would wander far off.
verses.8: “I would hurry to a shelter from the stormy wind and storm.”
verses.9: Confuse them, Lord, and confound their language,
verses.10: Day and night they prowl around on its walls.
verses.12: For it was not an enemy who insulted me,
verses.13: But it was you, a man like me,
verses.15: Let death come suddenly on them.
verses.16: As for me, I will call on God.
verses.17: Evening, morning, and at noon, I will cry out in distress.
verses.18: He has redeemed my soul in peace from the battle that was against me,
verses.20: He raises his hands against his friends.
verses.21: His mouth was smooth as butter,
verses.22: Cast your burden on the LORD and he will sustain you.
verses.23: But you, God, will bring them down into the pit of destruction.
